headline: Adobe’s AI growth takes center stage after guidance raise
summary: This quarter made one thing clear. Adobe’s (ADBE) AI story now has real revenue behind it. For months, investors debated whether generative AI would expand the business or simply add costs with minimal returns. That debate is starting to shift with the company's first report of AI-first ARR. Adobe ...

headline: Adobe’s (ADBE) Selloff Isn’t a Buy-the-Dip Opportunity Yet
summary: Adobe (ADBE) has been at the center of a sharp sell-off over the past several months, with shares now down more than 60% from their 2021 peak, but this still doesn’t shape up as a compelling buy-the-dip opportunity. The magnitude of the drawdown is notable, marking one of the steepest declines of this kind within a five-year period. The slowdown in its core business — arguably facing increasing pressure from artificial intelligence (AI) offerings and competition from more affordable alternatives
